productDisplayName: Scullers For Her Women Pink Check Top Pink Tops
description: Composition Dark pink and black check shirt made of 100% cotton, with elbow length sleeves that have a buttoned hem, embroidered chest buttoned placket, short collar and two pleats at the upper back   Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Hand wash or machine wash in cold water Use mild detergent Tumble dry low Dry in shade Do not bleach Warm iron Get back to the basics with this checked shirt from scullers. The contoured seams and the elbow length sleeves makes this shirt a great choice for everyday wear. Team it with denims, stilettos and sleek, long earrings for a really cool look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 5’9”; Chest: 33”; Shoulders: 15.5”
